components.name: Express Application
components.description: Node.js/Express web application. Declared in package.json with express@4.19.2, sequelize@6.37.1, and lodash@4.17.10. Entry point server.js referenced in Dockerfile but absent from repo — minimal fixture.

components.name: Container Infrastructure
components.description: Docker container running Node.js 20 Alpine. Runs as root (no USER directive). Single exposed port 3000. No TLS, no reverse proxy.
